2604.26630.title: SAGE: A Strategy-Aware Graph-Enhanced Generation Framework For Online Counseling
2604.26630.paper_summary: Effective mental health counseling is a complex, theory-driven process requiring the simultaneous integration of psychological frameworks, real-time distress signals, and strategic intervention planning. This level of clinical reasoning is critical for safety and therapeutic effectiveness but is often missing in general-purpose Large Language Models (LLMs). We introduce SAGE (Strategy-Aware Graph-Enhanced), a novel framework designed to bridge the gap between structured clinical knowledge and generative AI. SAGE constructs a heterogeneous graph that unifies conversational dynamics with a psychologically grounded layer, explicitly anchoring interactions in a theory-driven lexicon. Our architecture first employs a Next Strategy Classifier to identify the optimal therapeutic intervention. Subsequently, a Graph-Aware Attention mechanism projects graph-derived structural signals into soft prompts, conditioning the LLM to generate responses that maintain clinical depth. Validated through both automated metrics and expert human evaluation, SAGE outperforms baselines in strategy prediction and recommended response quality. By providing actionable intervention recommendations, SAGE serves as a cutting-edge decision-support tool designed to augment human expertise in high-stakes crisis counseling.
2604.26630.paper_summary_zh: 有效的心理健康諮詢是一個複雜的、以理論為驅動的過程，需要同時整合心理框架、即時的痛苦信號和戰略干預計劃。這種臨床推理的水平對於安全性和治療效果至關重要，但在通用的大型語言模型（LLMs）中往往缺失。我們介紹了SAGE（策略感知圖增強），這是一個旨在彌合結構化臨床知識與生成式人工智慧之間差距的新框架。SAGE構建了一個異質圖，將對話動態與心理學基礎層統一，明確地將互動錨定在以理論為驅動的詞彙中。我們的架構首先使用下一步策略分類器來識別最佳的治療干預。隨後，圖感知注意力機制將圖派生的結構信號投影到柔性提示中，調整LLM以生成保持臨床深度的回應。通過自動化指標和專家人員評估的驗證，SAGE在策略預測和建議回應質量方面超越了基準。通過提供可行的干預建議，SAGE作為一個尖端的決策支持工具，旨在增強人類在高風險危機諮詢中的專業知識。
2604.26630.author: Eliya Naomi Aharon et.al.
2604.26630.authors: Eliya Naomi Aharon, Meytal Grimland, Avi Segal, Loona Ben Dayan, Inbar Shenfeld, Yossi Levi Belz, Kobi Gal
